global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on promoting a new product collection.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection available for a limited time.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and lively backdrop.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A central area featuring two stylized product images, represented as simple outlines of rectangular shapes.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top reads 'VantaStyle', prominently displayed against the green background.

elements.label: Collection drop text
elements.description: Text in the center that states 'New collection drop', designed in a modern font for clarity.

elements.label: Weekend urgency text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main body that reads 'Only this weekend', emphasizing urgency.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Install now', designed to stand out against the background.

elements.label: Bottom text area
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad that reinforces the urgency of the offer, positioned centrally.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Only this weekend

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the brand name 'VantaStyle' in a stylish font.

elements.label: Install now text
elements.description: Text at the bottom right corner that reads 'Install now', encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, VantaStyle, new collection drop
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
